title: Infosys completes acquisition of Optimum Healthcare IT
detailed_summary: Infosys announced on May 5, 2026 that it completed the acquisition of Optimum Healthcare IT, a healthcare digital transformation and consulting firm focused on provider organizations. The completion follows Infosys's March 25, 2026 announcement. Infosys said the acquisition strengthens its healthcare capabilities, particularly with health systems and provider organizations, enhances its presence in the provider segment, adds new clients and relationships, expands technology capabilities, and creates synergies across new buying centers. Infosys also said combining Optimum's provider experience with Infosys Topaz and Infosys Cobalt is expected to support cloud, data, and digital transformation for healthcare providers.
